headline: Melting Forest, a Leading Functional Beverage Brand Powered by Mushroom Adaptogens, Generates Tremendous Success Via National Retail Focus with Recent Securement of Target Seasonal and GNC Nationwide Deals
summary: Melting Forest, a leading functional beverage brand powered by mushroom adaptogens, driving the next wave of innovation in the mainstream beverage aisle, is pleased to announce tremendous strides regarding the brand's continued focus on retail dominance nationwide.

headline: Nuvini Nears Close on Beyondsoft Americas Buyout; Transformative Combination Creates a ~$148M Revenue Global Technology Platform -- 4x Revenue Across 15 Countries
